meaning: n.[植] 莳萝,莳萝的果实
examples: Prepare Passion Fruit Vinaigrette by mixing olive oil, passion fruit juice, shallot and dill together. Add salt and pepper to taste.
In To Kill a Mockingbird, Harper Lee based Dill on her childhood friend, Truman Capote.
Broil, bake or poach it with dill.
Chicken was cooked with dill, cuttlefish with their ink and wine, octopus with chickpeas.
Cumin, lemon or orange peel, cardamom, dill, clove, aniseed and fennel are also typical.
